description: You are a satellite mission planner. Your payload operations require precise timing of Ascending Node crossings. Using Script Runner in OpenC3 COSMOS, document an Ascending Node crossing (where POSZ transitions from negative to positive) by monitoring the INST ADCS telemetry. Capture the POSX and POSZ values from the telemetry readings immediately preceding and following the crossing. Save the data to /home/ga/Desktop/node_crossing.json with the following structure: 'target' ('INST'), 'crossing_type' ('ASCENDING_NODE'), 'pre_crossing' (dict with 'posx' and 'posz' floats), and 'post_crossing' (dict with 'posx' and 'posz' floats). OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
